text.message: I don't think plowing me was sacrificing no wheat and little wood to lose...
why are you giving him advice?
Plowing you? You tried to plow me!
it was a calculated race... either you go for wheat and try to win or focus on racing me and sacrifice the game... elo resets are the worst
commentary implies not adding value. this game is good for it's social aspect and coming back from being behind, but that only works if players get better so your incintivised to help others...
Blue not sure why you traded with black and stole from me?
prob because you got wheat and won't have ore
So if I typed more you'd trade with me?!
I'll give this + next 2 no block...
Am just kidding man. Had to trade with 1 .
Red is anyway running away with this game.
You said you were Mr Nice guy earlier
Anyone who says Elo is the problem , is the problem..
elo isn't the problem. scrambling them up constantly is.
what elo where you guys previously?
the the board and first picks were standardized like chess, maybe reseting elos every few months might make more sense...
I'm just happy black has stopped typing. That's a win for me

but even in chess where where you take even turns going firt and the board is always the same so you can prove your worth, the elos don't change... this game is just too random to reset elo's every fe
